dict.string: FoodTracker needs access to your camera to scan food barcodes
FoodTracker needs access to your Health data to read active energy burned. This allows us to accurately calculate and adjust your daily calorie goals based on your activity.
FoodTracker needs access to your Health data to automatically sync your logged water intake and consumed calories, keeping all your health data centralized
This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you and improve analytics.
